Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Knight]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — A Knight is a type of person that can be challenged.}}

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 1''' — The Red Knight is the hotheaded leader of the Blue Knight's order.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — The narrator has a Knight to check on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The Knight channels power through short-range weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — The narrator has a Knight they must stop from doing something stupid.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — It is the Knight's job to defend their crew with their life.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The ship has a Knight onboard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Knight is a character who wrenched limbs away from the Divine Titan's controls.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
